releaseNotes:
## DLLRunTool v1.3.1

### Kubernetes
- Port-forward kieu Lens: modal local port/https, danh sach Port Forwarding Start/Stop, chi tiet service
- Ket noi cluster nhanh hon: vao dashboard ngay, load RBAC/namespace nen
- Bat/Tat Kubernetes thu cong: khong tu chay WebView khi an nham tab — tiet kiem RAM
- Cham trang thai cluster xanh khi da ket noi
- Hop thoai xac nhan tat K8s hien dung (an embed truoc khi hien dialog)

### Giao dien
- Service detail panel: Properties, Connection, Endpoints, Events
- Sua layout port-forward modal va service detail panel
